sections.title: Needle In Haystack
sections.description: Uses the `run_single_niah_test()` best accuracy criterion from `needle_in_haystack_test.py`.

sections.title: JSON Retrieval Generalization
sections.description: Uses pooled validation/test accuracy metrics from `run_json_retrieval_generalization_test()` covering teacher-forced and generation evaluation.

sections.title: Diagnostic A - Exact Recall
sections.description: Streams sparse fact tokens through long filler contexts and checks whether the queried value is recovered exactly.

sections.title: Diagnostic B - Error Override
sections.description: Writes an old fact, then a correction for the same key, and measures whether the latest fact overrides stale memory.

sections.title: Diagnostic C - Anti-fixation
sections.description: Builds a dominant wrong pattern plus one rare counterexample, then checks whether the model resists majority fixation.
